mapper.select:
SELECT id, hospital_id, department_id, doctor_name, title, specialty_text, gender_rule, age_min, age_max, crowd_tags_json, authority_score, academic_title_score, is_expert, campus_name, active_status, create_time, update_time FROM doctor_profile
AND doctor_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY authority_score DESC
